positive_feedback: IN1: output-formats/data-contract define the 21-item hybrid structure once and validate-goal-output.py checks the structure, banned vague wording, numeric/action constraints and at least three do-not-do items before save.
OUT1: weekly/monthly/bimonthly variants, project-task rules and output formatter are covered by test_validate_goal_output; UBM plugin 199 tests PASS.

OUT2/C1-C4: the behavioral gate is now explicitly routed in the body from AskUserQuestion through Phase3 dialogue, Phase5 validation and Phase6 scoped Daily.md embed update. Agent/prompt/schema/hook dependencies exist and knowledge mutation delegates to run-ubm-knowledge-sync.

notes: Iteration 1 found OUT2 visible only in frontmatter; iteration 2 added the behavioral acceptance pointer without conflating static design review and live execution evidence.
